narrative:
Johnstown C (precinct in Licking County) has 1,341 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.2 percentage points.
